title: Carpentry & Chisels
description: Adds new wooden building blocks and a new tool called the Chisel which you can use to carve and chisel blocks!
body:
![Mod Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bd195067bb39bdda496ee4aec8dadcf5cb34839_0.webp)

Carpentry & Chisels is a Minecraft mod for both Fabric and Forge that adds new wooden building blocks and a new tool called the Chisel which you can use to carve and chisel blocks!
## Features

**Carved Wood -** These blocks can be crafted with 2 wood slabs, once crafted you will be given the base version of the carved wood block, then you can craft a Chisel to carve up to 7 patterns into the block!

**Chisel -** The Chisel has an attack damage of 3 and 250 durability and can carve blocks by interacting with them, they can also save patterns to carve later. The Chisel can also chisel other blocks!

**Wooden Poles -** These blocks can be crafted with 2 logs, once crafted the player can use these Poles as they see fit! These Poles can also be stripped with an axe.

**Log Slabs -** These slabs can be crafted and placed like normal vanilla slabs. These slabs can also be stripped!

**Has Built In Compatibility With Wood Good -** By downloading Wood Good also known as Every Compat, you can have compatibility with this mod and any mod that adds wood sets!

## How to add integration

You can add integration with the Chisel using Data-packs. Here is a link to a guide explaining how to do that!

https://kekecreations.boomla.net/mods/minecraft-java-edition/carpentry-and-chisels/chisel-compat
